name: Barbarian
short_description: A fierce warrior who channels primal Rage to deal devastating damage and shrug off mortal wounds.
full_description:
# Barbarian

## Core Barbarian Traits

| Trait | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Primary Ability** | Strength |
| **Hit Point Die** | D12 per Barbarian level |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Strength and Constitution |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | *Choose 2:* Animal Handling, Athletics, Intimidation, Nature, Perception, or Survival |
| **Weapon Proficiencies** | Simple and Martial weapons |
| **Armor Training** | Light and Medium armor and Shields |
| **Starting Equipment** | *Choose A or B:* (A) Greataxe, 4 Handaxes, Explorer's Pack, and 15 GP; or (B) 75 GP |

## Becoming a Barbarian

**As a Level 1 Character**
- Gain all the traits in the Core Barbarian Traits table.
- Gain the Barbarian's level 1 features, which are listed in the Barbarian Features table.

**As a Multiclass Character**
- Gain the following traits from the Core Barbarian Traits table: Hit Point Die, proficiency with Martial weapons, and training with Shields.
- Gain the Barbarian's level 1 features, which are listed in the Barbarian Features table.

## Barbarian Features

| Level | PB | Class Features | Rages | Rage Dmg | Weapon Mastery |
|-------|----|----------------|-------|----------|----------------|
| 1 | +2 | Rage, Unarmored Defense, Weapon Mastery | 2 | +2 | 2 |
| 2 | +2 | Danger Sense, Reckless Attack | 2 | +2 | 2 |
| 3 | +2 | Barbarian Subclass, Primal Knowledge | 3 | +2 | 2 |
| 4 | +2 | Ability Score Improvement | 3 | +2 | 3 |
| 5 | +3 | Extra Attack, Fast Movement | 3 | +2 | 3 |
| 6 | +3 | Subclass feature | 4 | +2 | 3 |
| 7 | +3 | Feral Instinct, Instinctive Pounce | 4 | +2 | 3 |
| 8 | +3 | Ability Score Improvement | 4 | +2 | 3 |
| 9 | +4 | Brutal Strike | 4 | +3 | 3 |
| 10 | +4 | Subclass feature | 4 | +3 | 4 |
| 11 | +4 | Relentless Rage | 4 | +3 | 4 |
| 12 | +4 | Ability Score Improvement | 5 | +3 | 4 |
| 13 | +5 | Improved Brutal Strike | 5 | +3 | 4 |
| 14 | +5 | Subclass feature | 5 | +3 | 4 |
| 15 | +5 | Persistent Rage | 5 | +3 | 4 |
| 16 | +5 | Ability Score Improvement | 5 | +4 | 4 |
| 17 | +6 | Improved Brutal Strike | 6 | +4 | 4 |
| 18 | +6 | Indomitable Might | 6 | +4 | 4 |
| 19 | +6 | Epic Boon | 6 | +4 | 4 |
| 20 | +6 | Primal Champion | 6 | +4 | 4 |

## Key Class Features

### Level 1: Rage
You can imbue yourself with a primal power called Rage, a force that grants you extraordinary might and resilience. You can enter it as a Bonus Action if you aren't wearing Heavy armor. You can enter your Rage the number of times shown for your Barbarian level in the Rages column. You regain one expended use when you finish a Short Rest, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

While active, your Rage follows these rules:
- **Damage Resistance.** You have Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.
- **Rage Damage.** When you make a Strength-based attack and deal damage, you gain a bonus to the damage that increases as you gain levels.
- **Strength Advantage.** You have Advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws.
- **No Concentration or Spells.** You can't maintain Concentration, and you can't cast spells.
- **Duration.** The Rage lasts until the end of your next turn, and ends early if you don Heavy armor or have the Incapacitated condition. You can extend Rage by attacking, forcing a save, or taking a Bonus Action. Max duration is 10 minutes.

### Level 1: Unarmored Defense
While you aren't wearing any armor, your base AC equals 10 plus your Dexterity and Constitution modifiers. You can use a Shield and still gain this benefit.

### Level 1: Weapon Mastery
Your training with weapons allows you to use the mastery properties of two kinds of Simple or Martial Melee weapons of your choice.

### Level 2: Danger Sense
You have Advantage on Dexterity saving throws unless you have the Incapacitated condition.

### Level 2: Reckless Attack
When you make your first attack roll on your turn, you can attack recklessly: Advantage on Strength attack rolls until the start of your next turn, but attack rolls against you have Advantage during that time.

### Level 3: Barbarian Subclass / Primal Knowledge
Gain a subclass. Also gain proficiency in another skill of your choice, and channel primal power for certain skill checks using Strength.

### Level 5: Extra Attack / Fast Movement
Attack twice when you take the Attack action. Speed increases by 10 ft while not in Heavy armor.

### Level 7: Feral Instinct / Instinctive Pounce
Advantage on Initiative rolls. Move up to half your Speed as part of entering Rage.

### Level 9: Brutal Strike
Forgo Advantage on a Strength attack to deal an extra 1d10 damage and apply one of: Forceful Blow (push 15 ft, move toward), Hamstring Blow (target's Speed reduced by 15 ft).

### Level 11: Relentless Rage
When you drop to 0 HP while raging, make a DC 10 Con save to change to HP equal to twice your Barbarian level. DC increases by 5 each use.

### Level 13: Improved Brutal Strike
New options: Staggering Blow (Disadvantage on next save, no Opportunity Attacks) and Sundering Blow (+5 bonus to next attack against target).

### Level 15: Persistent Rage
Regain expended Rages on Initiative. Rage lasts 10 minutes without needing to extend.

### Level 17: Improved Brutal Strike
Extra damage increases to 2d10; use two Brutal Strike effects per use.

### Level 18: Indomitable Might
If your Strength check or save total is less than your Strength score, use the score.

### Level 19: Epic Boon
Gain an Epic Boon feat. Boon of Irresistible Offense is recommended.

### Level 20: Primal Champion
Your Strength and Constitution scores increase by 4, to a maximum of 25.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Bard
short_description: A magical performer whose words, music, and dance weave inspiration into allies and disruption into foes.
full_description:
# Bard

## Core Bard Traits

| Trait | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Primary Ability** | Charisma |
| **Hit Point Die** | D8 per Bard level |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Dexterity and Charisma |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | *Choose any 3 skills* |
| **Weapon Proficiencies** | Simple weapons |
| **Tool Proficiencies** | *Choose 3 Musical Instruments* |
| **Armor Training** | Light armor |
| **Starting Equipment** | *Choose A or B:* (A) Leather Armor, 2 Daggers, Musical Instrument, Entertainer's Pack, and 19 GP; or (B) 90 GP |

## Bard Features

| Level | PB | Class Features | Bardic Die | Cantrips | Prepared Spells |
|-------|----|----------------|------------|----------|-----------------|
| 1 | +2 | Bardic Inspiration, Spellcasting | D6 | 2 | 4 |
| 2 | +2 | Expertise, Jack of All Trades | D6 | 2 | 5 |
| 3 | +2 | Bard Subclass | D6 | 2 | 6 |
| 4 | +2 | Ability Score Improvement | D6 | 3 | 7 |
| 5 | +3 | Font of Inspiration | D8 | 3 | 9 |
| 6 | +3 | Subclass feature | D8 | 3 | 10 |
| 7 | +3 | Countercharm | D8 | 3 | 11 |
| 8 | +3 | Ability Score Improvement | D8 | 3 | 12 |
| 9 | +4 | Expertise | D8 | 3 | 14 |
| 10 | +4 | Magical Secrets | D10 | 4 | 15 |
| 11–13 | +4/+5 | — | D10/D12 | 4 | 16–17 |
| 14 | +5 | Subclass feature | D10 | 4 | 17 |
| 18 | +6 | Superior Inspiration | D12 | 4 | 20 |
| 19 | +6 | Epic Boon | D12 | 4 | 21 |
| 20 | +6 | Words of Creation | D12 | 4 | 22 |

## Key Class Features

### Level 1: Bardic Inspiration
As a Bonus Action, inspire another creature within 60 feet (sees or hears you). That creature gains one Bardic Inspiration die. When the creature fails a D20 Test within the next hour, it can roll the die and add the result. Uses equal to Charisma modifier (min 1), regained on Long Rest. Die size grows: d6, d8 at 5, d10 at 10, d12 at 15.

### Level 1: Spellcasting
Charisma is your spellcasting ability. Musical Instrument as Spellcasting Focus. You know 2 cantrips and prepare spells from the Bard list.

### Level 2: Expertise / Jack of All Trades
Expertise in 2 skill proficiencies. Add half your Proficiency Bonus to ability checks that don't already use your Proficiency Bonus.

### Level 3: Bard Subclass
Gain a Bard subclass.

### Level 5: Font of Inspiration
Regain all Bardic Inspiration on Short or Long Rest. Expend a spell slot to regain one use.

### Level 7: Countercharm
When you or a creature within 30 feet fails a save against Charmed or Frightened, take a Reaction to force a reroll with Advantage.

### Level 9: Expertise
Expertise in two more skill proficiencies.

### Level 10: Magical Secrets
Prepared spells can include any spells from the Bard, Cleric, Druid, and Wizard lists.

### Level 18: Superior Inspiration
Regain Bardic Inspiration on Initiative (up to 2).

### Level 20: Words of Creation
Always have *Power Word Heal* and *Power Word Kill* prepared, with the ability to target a second creature within 10 feet of the first.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Cleric
short_description: A priestly champion who wields divine magic in service of a higher power, healing allies and striking down foes.
full_description:
# Cleric

## Core Cleric Traits

| Trait | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Primary Ability** | Wisdom |
| **Hit Point Die** | D8 per Cleric level |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Wisdom and Charisma |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | *Choose 2:* History, Insight, Medicine, Persuasion, or Religion |
| **Weapon Proficiencies** | Simple weapons |
| **Armor Training** | Light and Medium armor and Shields |
| **Starting Equipment** | *Choose A or B:* (A) Chain Shirt, Shield, Mace, Holy Symbol, Priest's Pack, and 7 GP; or (B) 110 GP |

## Cleric Features

| Level | PB | Class Features | Channel Divinity | Cantrips | Prepared Spells |
|-------|----|----------------|------------------|----------|-----------------|
| 1 | +2 | Spellcasting, Divine Order | — | 3 | 4 |
| 2 | +2 | Channel Divinity | 2 | 3 | 5 |
| 3 | +2 | Cleric Subclass | 2 | 3 | 6 |
| 4 | +2 | Ability Score Improvement | 2 | 4 | 7 |
| 5 | +3 | Sear Undead | 2 | 4 | 9 |
| 6 | +3 | Subclass feature | 3 | 4 | 10 |
| 7 | +3 | Blessed Strikes | 3 | 4 | 11 |
| 10 | +4 | Divine Intervention | 3 | 5 | 15 |
| 14 | +5 | Improved Blessed Strikes | 3 | 5 | 17 |
| 17 | +6 | Subclass feature | 3 | 5 | 19 |
| 19 | +6 | Epic Boon | 4 | 5 | 21 |
| 20 | +6 | Greater Divine Intervention | 4 | 5 | 22 |

## Key Class Features

### Level 1: Spellcasting
Wisdom is your spellcasting ability. You know 3 cantrips and prepare spells from the Cleric list. Use a Holy Symbol as a Spellcasting Focus.

### Level 1: Divine Order
Dedicate to a sacred role:
- **Protector.** Proficiency with Martial weapons and Heavy armor.
- **Thaumaturge.** Extra cantrip; mystical bonus to Arcana/Religion checks equal to Wisdom modifier (min +1).

### Level 2: Channel Divinity
Channel divine energy. You start with two effects: **Divine Spark** (Magic action: 30 ft, restore HP or deal Necrotic/Radiant damage equal to 1d8 + Wisdom mod) and **Turn Undead** (each Undead within 30 ft makes Wisdom save or has Frightened and Incapacitated for 1 minute, must flee). Two uses, regain on Short Rest.

### Level 3: Cleric Subclass
Gain a Cleric subclass.

### Level 5: Sear Undead
When using Turn Undead, roll Wisdom modifier d8s; each failed Undead takes Radiant damage equal to the total.

### Level 7: Blessed Strikes
Choose **Divine Strike** (once per turn, +1d8 Necrotic/Radiant on weapon hit) or **Potent Spellcasting** (add Wisdom modifier to cantrip damage).

### Level 10: Divine Intervention
Magic action: cast any Cleric spell of level 5 or lower without slot/material components. Once per Long Rest.

### Level 14: Improved Blessed Strikes
Divine Strike damage becomes 2d8. Potent Spellcasting grants Temporary Hit Points equal to twice Wisdom modifier when you damage with a cantrip.

### Level 20: Greater Divine Intervention
Divine Intervention can use *Wish*; if so, can't use again until 2d4 Long Rests pass.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Druid
short_description: A priest of the Old Faith, wielding the magic of nature and transforming into beasts to defend the wilds.
full_description:
# Druid

## Core Druid Traits

| Trait | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Primary Ability** | Wisdom |
| **Hit Point Die** | D8 per Druid level |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Intelligence and Wisdom |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | *Choose 2:* Animal Handling, Arcana, Insight, Medicine, Nature, Perception, Religion, or Survival |
| **Weapon Proficiencies** | Simple weapons |
| **Tool Proficiencies** | Herbalism Kit |
| **Armor Training** | Light armor and Shields |
| **Starting Equipment** | *Choose A or B:* (A) Leather Armor, Shield, Sickle, Druidic Focus (Quarterstaff), Explorer's Pack, Herbalism Kit, and 9 GP; or (B) 50 GP |

## Druid Features

| Level | PB | Class Features | Wild Shape | Cantrips | Prepared Spells |
|-------|----|----------------|------------|----------|-----------------|
| 1 | +2 | Spellcasting, Druidic, Primal Order | — | 2 | 4 |
| 2 | +2 | Wild Shape, Wild Companion | 2 | 2 | 5 |
| 3 | +2 | Druid Subclass | 2 | 2 | 6 |
| 5 | +3 | Wild Resurgence | 2 | 3 | 9 |
| 7 | +3 | Elemental Fury | 3 | 3 | 11 |
| 15 | +5 | Improved Elemental Fury | 3 | 4 | 18 |
| 18 | +6 | Beast Spells | 4 | 4 | 20 |
| 20 | +6 | Archdruid | 4 | 4 | 22 |

## Key Class Features

### Level 1: Spellcasting
Wisdom is your spellcasting ability. Use a Druidic Focus.

### Level 1: Druidic
Know the secret language of Druids; always have *Speak with Animals* prepared.

### Level 1: Primal Order
- **Magician.** Extra cantrip; bonus to Arcana/Nature checks equal to Wisdom modifier (min +1).
- **Warden.** Proficiency with Martial weapons and Medium armor.

### Level 2: Wild Shape
As a Bonus Action, shape-shift into a Beast form (Max CR per level table; no Fly Speed until level 8). Lasts hours equal to half Druid level. While shifted, you gain Temporary HP equal to Druid level. Uses regain on Short Rest. You can't cast spells while shifted (until level 18), but can maintain Concentration.

### Level 2: Wild Companion
Magic action: expend a spell slot or Wild Shape use to cast *Find Familiar* (no Material components). Familiar is Fey, disappears on Long Rest.

### Level 5: Wild Resurgence
Once on a turn, if you have no Wild Shape uses, expend a spell slot to gain one. Or expend Wild Shape to gain a level 1 spell slot.

### Level 7: Elemental Fury
Choose **Potent Spellcasting** (add Wisdom to cantrip damage) or **Primal Strike** (once per turn, extra 1d8 Cold/Fire/Lightning/Thunder on weapon or Beast attack).

### Level 15: Improved Elemental Fury
Potent Spellcasting: cantrip range increases by 300 feet. Primal Strike: extra damage to 2d8.

### Level 18: Beast Spells
While using Wild Shape, you can cast spells (except those with consumed Material components).

### Level 20: Archdruid
Evergreen Wild Shape (regain a use on Initiative). Nature Magician (convert Wild Shape to spell slots up to level 5). Longevity (age 10 years per 1 year).

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Fighter
short_description: A master of weapons and armor whose unmatched combat versatility delivers victory through skill and tactics.
full_description:
# Fighter

## Core Fighter Traits

| Trait | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Primary Ability** | Strength or Dexterity |
| **Hit Point Die** | D10 per Fighter level |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Strength and Constitution |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | *Choose 2:* Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Perception, or Survival |
| **Weapon Proficiencies** | Simple and Martial weapons |
| **Armor Training** | Light, Medium, and Heavy armor and Shields |
| **Starting Equipment** | *Choose A, B, or C:* (A) Chain Mail, Greatsword, Flail, 8 Javelins, Dungeoneer's Pack, and 4 GP; (B) Studded Leather Armor, Scimitar, Shortsword, Longbow, 20 Arrows, Quiver, Dungeoneer's Pack, and 11 GP; or (C) 155 GP |

## Fighter Features

| Level | PB | Class Features | Second Wind | Weapon Mastery |
|-------|----|----------------|-------------|----------------|
| 1 | +2 | Fighting Style, Second Wind, Weapon Mastery | 2 | 3 |
| 2 | +2 | Action Surge (one use), Tactical Mind | 2 | 3 |
| 3 | +2 | Fighter Subclass | 2 | 3 |
| 5 | +3 | Extra Attack, Tactical Shift | 3 | 4 |
| 9 | +4 | Indomitable (one use), Tactical Master | 3 | 4 |
| 11 | +4 | Two Extra Attacks | 4 | 5 |
| 13 | +5 | Indomitable (two uses), Studied Attacks | 4 | 5 |
| 17 | +6 | Action Surge (two uses), Indomitable (three uses) | 4 | 6 |
| 19 | +6 | Epic Boon | 4 | 6 |
| 20 | +6 | Three Extra Attacks | 4 | 6 |

## Key Class Features

### Level 1: Fighting Style
Gain a Fighting Style feat. Defense is recommended. Can swap when gaining Fighter levels.

### Level 1: Second Wind
Bonus Action: regain HP equal to 1d10 + Fighter level. Two uses; regain one on Short Rest, all on Long Rest.

### Level 1: Weapon Mastery
Use the mastery properties of three Simple or Martial weapons.

### Level 2: Action Surge
Take one additional action on your turn (except Magic action). Once per Short Rest; twice from level 17.

### Level 2: Tactical Mind
When you fail an ability check, expend a use of Second Wind to roll 1d10 and add it; if still fails, the use isn't expended.

### Level 5: Extra Attack / Tactical Shift
Attack twice when you take Attack. After Second Wind Bonus Action, move up to half Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

### Level 9: Indomitable / Tactical Master
Reroll a failed save with a bonus equal to Fighter level. Replace a weapon's mastery with Push, Sap, or Slow for an attack.

### Level 11: Two Extra Attacks
Attack three times instead of once.

### Level 13: Studied Attacks
If you miss, you have Advantage on your next attack against the target before your next turn.

### Level 20: Three Extra Attacks
Attack four times instead of once.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Monk
short_description: A master of martial arts who harnesses inner energy through Focus to deliver fast, precise unarmed strikes.
full_description:
# Monk

## Core Monk Traits

| Trait | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Primary Ability** | Dexterity and Wisdom |
| **Hit Point Die** | D8 per Monk level |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Strength and Dexterity |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | *Choose 2:* Acrobatics, Athletics, History, Insight, Religion, or Stealth |
| **Weapon Proficiencies** | Simple weapons and Martial weapons that have the Light property |
| **Tool Proficiencies** | *Choose one type of Artisan's Tools or Musical Instrument* |
| **Armor Training** | None |
| **Starting Equipment** | *Choose A or B:* (A) Spear, 5 Daggers, Artisan's Tools or Musical Instrument, Explorer's Pack, and 11 GP; or (B) 50 GP |

## Monk Features

| Level | PB | Class Features | Martial Arts | Focus Points | Unarmored Movement |
|-------|----|----------------|--------------|--------------|---------------------|
| 1 | +2 | Martial Arts, Unarmored Defense | 1d6 | — | — |
| 2 | +2 | Monk's Focus, Unarmored Movement, Uncanny Metabolism | 1d6 | 2 | +10 ft. |
| 3 | +2 | Deflect Attacks, Monk Subclass | 1d6 | 3 | +10 ft. |
| 5 | +3 | Extra Attack, Stunning Strike | 1d8 | 5 | +10 ft. |
| 6 | +3 | Empowered Strikes, Subclass feature | 1d8 | 6 | +15 ft. |
| 7 | +3 | Evasion | 1d8 | 7 | +15 ft. |
| 9 | +4 | Acrobatic Movement | 1d8 | 9 | +15 ft. |
| 10 | +4 | Heightened Focus, Self-Restoration | 1d8 | 10 | +20 ft. |
| 13 | +5 | Deflect Energy | 1d10 | 13 | +20 ft. |
| 14 | +5 | Disciplined Survivor | 1d10 | 14 | +25 ft. |
| 15 | +5 | Perfect Focus | 1d10 | 15 | +25 ft. |
| 18 | +6 | Superior Defense | 1d12 | 18 | +30 ft. |
| 19 | +6 | Epic Boon | 1d12 | 19 | +30 ft. |
| 20 | +6 | Body and Mind | 1d12 | 20 | +30 ft. |

## Key Class Features

### Level 1: Martial Arts
Mastery of combat styles using Unarmed Strike and Monk weapons:
- **Bonus Unarmed Strike.** Make Unarmed Strike as Bonus Action.
- **Martial Arts Die.** Roll 1d6 in place of normal damage.
- **Dexterous Attacks.** Use Dex modifier for attack/damage rolls and Unarmed Strike save DC.

### Level 1: Unarmored Defense
Unarmored, no shield: AC = 10 + Dex + Wis modifiers.

### Level 2: Monk's Focus
Focus Points fuel Monk features (Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, Step of the Wind). Save DC = 8 + Wis + PB.
- **Flurry of Blows (1 FP).** Make two Unarmed Strikes as Bonus Action.
- **Patient Defense (1 FP).** Take Disengage and Dodge as Bonus Action.
- **Step of the Wind (1 FP).** Take Disengage and Dash as Bonus Action; jump distance doubled.

### Level 2: Unarmored Movement / Uncanny Metabolism
Speed increases by 10 ft (more at later levels). On Initiative, regain expended Focus Points; gain HP = Monk level + Martial Arts roll. Once per Long Rest.

### Level 3: Deflect Attacks
Reaction: reduce Bludgeoning/Piercing/Slashing damage by 1d10 + Dex + Monk level. If reduced to 0, expend 1 FP to redirect.

### Level 5: Extra Attack / Stunning Strike
Attack twice. Once per turn on hit, expend 1 FP: Con save or Stunned until start of your next turn.

### Level 6: Empowered Strikes
Unarmed Strikes can deal Force damage instead of normal type.

### Level 7: Evasion
Succeed on Dex save: no damage; fail: half damage.

### Level 9: Acrobatic Movement
Move along vertical surfaces and across liquids.

### Level 10: Heightened Focus / Self-Restoration
Flurry of Blows: three strikes for 1 FP. Patient Defense: gain THP equal to two Martial Arts rolls. Step of the Wind: move a willing creature 5 ft. Remove Charmed/Frightened/Poisoned at end of turn. Forgo food/drink without Exhaustion.

### Level 13: Deflect Energy
Deflect Attacks works against any damage type.

### Level 14: Disciplined Survivor
Proficiency in all saving throws. Spend 1 FP to reroll a failed save.

### Level 15: Perfect Focus
If you skip Uncanny Metabolism on Initiative, regain Focus Points until you have 4 (if you have 3 or fewer).

### Level 18: Superior Defense
Start of turn: spend 3 FP to gain Resistance to all damage except Force for 1 minute.

### Level 20: Body and Mind
Dexterity and Wisdom increase by 4, max 25.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Paladin
short_description: A holy warrior bound by a sacred oath who fuses martial prowess with divine magic to protect and judge.
full_description:
# Paladin

## Core Paladin Traits

| Trait | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Primary Ability** | Strength and Charisma |
| **Hit Point Die** | D10 per Paladin level |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Wisdom and Charisma |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | *Choose 2:* Athletics, Insight, Intimidation, Medicine, Persuasion, or Religion |
| **Weapon Proficiencies** | Simple and Martial weapons |
| **Armor Training** | Light, Medium, and Heavy armor and Shields |
| **Starting Equipment** | *Choose A or B:* (A) Chain Mail, Shield, Longsword, 6 Javelins, Holy Symbol, Priest's Pack, and 9 GP; or (B) 150 GP |

## Paladin Features

| Level | PB | Class Features | Channel Divinity | Prepared Spells |
|-------|----|----------------|------------------|-----------------|
| 1 | +2 | Lay On Hands, Spellcasting, Weapon Mastery | — | 2 |
| 2 | +2 | Fighting Style, Paladin's Smite | — | 3 |
| 3 | +2 | Channel Divinity, Paladin Subclass | 2 | 4 |
| 5 | +3 | Extra Attack, Faithful Steed | 2 | 6 |
| 6 | +3 | Aura of Protection | 2 | 6 |
| 9 | +4 | Abjure Foes | 2 | 9 |
| 10 | +4 | Aura of Courage | 2 | 9 |
| 11 | +4 | Radiant Strikes | 3 | 10 |
| 14 | +5 | Restoring Touch | 3 | 11 |
| 18 | +6 | Aura Expansion | 3 | 14 |
| 19 | +6 | Epic Boon | 3 | 15 |

## Key Class Features

### Level 1: Lay On Hands
Pool of healing equal to 5 × Paladin level. As a Bonus Action, restore HP to a creature you touch (yourself included). Spend 5 HP from the pool to remove the Poisoned condition (those points don't restore HP).

### Level 1: Spellcasting
Charisma is your spellcasting ability. Use a Holy Symbol as Spellcasting Focus.

### Level 1: Weapon Mastery
Use the mastery properties of two weapons of your choice.

### Level 2: Fighting Style
Gain a Fighting Style feat. Or choose **Blessed Warrior**: learn two Cleric cantrips, cast as Paladin spells using Charisma.

### Level 2: Paladin's Smite
Always have *Divine Smite* prepared. Once per Long Rest, cast it without a spell slot.

### Level 3: Channel Divinity
Start with **Divine Sense** (Bonus Action: detect Celestials/Fiends/Undead within 60 ft for 10 minutes). Two uses, regain one on Short Rest. Gain another use at level 11.

### Level 5: Extra Attack / Faithful Steed
Attack twice. Always have *Find Steed* prepared; cast it without a slot once per Long Rest.

### Level 6: Aura of Protection
10-ft Emanation: you and allies gain a bonus to saves equal to your Charisma modifier (min +1).

### Level 9: Abjure Foes
Magic action: expend Channel Divinity to make creatures within 60 ft (number equal to Charisma mod) Frightened for 1 minute (Wis save).

### Level 10: Aura of Courage
You and allies in your aura have Immunity to the Frightened condition.

### Level 11: Radiant Strikes
Melee weapon or Unarmed Strike hits deal an extra 1d8 Radiant damage.

### Level 14: Restoring Touch
When using Lay On Hands, can also remove Blinded/Charmed/Deafened/Frightened/Paralyzed/Stunned (5 HP per condition).

### Level 18: Aura Expansion
Aura of Protection becomes a 30-foot Emanation.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Ranger
short_description: A wilderness hunter who tracks favored prey through any terrain, blending martial skill and primal magic.
full_description:
# Ranger

## Core Ranger Traits

| Trait | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Primary Ability** | Dexterity and Wisdom |
| **Hit Point Die** | D10 per Ranger level |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Strength and Dexterity |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | *Choose 3:* Animal Handling, Athletics, Insight, Investigation, Nature, Perception, Stealth, or Survival |
| **Weapon Proficiencies** | Simple and Martial weapons |
| **Armor Training** | Light and Medium armor and Shields |
| **Starting Equipment** | *Choose A or B:* (A) Studded Leather Armor, Scimitar, Shortsword, Longbow, 20 Arrows, Quiver, Druidic Focus (sprig of mistletoe), Explorer's Pack, and 7 GP; or (B) 150 GP |

## Ranger Features

| Level | PB | Class Features | Favored Enemy | Prepared Spells |
|-------|----|----------------|---------------|-----------------|
| 1 | +2 | Spellcasting, Favored Enemy, Weapon Mastery | 2 | 2 |
| 2 | +2 | Deft Explorer, Fighting Style | 2 | 3 |
| 3 | +2 | Ranger Subclass | 2 | 4 |
| 5 | +3 | Extra Attack | 3 | 6 |
| 6 | +3 | Roving | 3 | 6 |
| 9 | +4 | Expertise | 4 | 9 |
| 10 | +4 | Tireless | 4 | 9 |
| 13 | +5 | Relentless Hunter | 5 | 11 |
| 14 | +5 | Nature's Veil | 5 | 11 |
| 17 | +6 | Precise Hunter | 6 | 14 |
| 18 | +6 | Feral Senses | 6 | 14 |
| 19 | +6 | Epic Boon | 6 | 15 |
| 20 | +6 | Foe Slayer | 6 | 15 |

## Key Class Features

### Level 1: Spellcasting
Wisdom is your spellcasting ability. Use a Druidic Focus.

### Level 1: Favored Enemy
Always have *Hunter's Mark* prepared. Cast twice without a slot, regain on Long Rest. Uses increase with level.

### Level 1: Weapon Mastery
Use mastery properties of two weapons.

### Level 2: Deft Explorer
Expertise in one skill. Know two additional languages.

### Level 2: Fighting Style
Gain a Fighting Style feat, or **Druidic Warrior**: learn two Druid cantrips, cast as Ranger spells using Wisdom.

### Level 5: Extra Attack
Attack twice.

### Level 6: Roving
Speed increases by 10 ft (not in Heavy armor). Gain Climb and Swim Speed equal to Speed.

### Level 9: Expertise
Expertise in two more skills.

### Level 10: Tireless
Temporary HP equal to 1d8 + Wisdom (min +1) via Magic action. Decrease Exhaustion by 1 on Short Rest.

### Level 13: Relentless Hunter
Damage can't break Concentration on *Hunter's Mark*.

### Level 14: Nature's Veil
Bonus Action: gain Invisible condition until end of next turn. Uses equal to Wisdom modifier.

### Level 17: Precise Hunter
Advantage on attack rolls against creature marked by *Hunter's Mark*.

### Level 18: Feral Senses
Blindsight (30 ft).

### Level 20: Foe Slayer
*Hunter's Mark* damage die is d10 instead of d6.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Rogue
short_description: A scoundrel skilled in stealth, subterfuge, and precise attacks that exploit a foe's distraction.
full_description:
# Rogue

## Core Rogue Traits

| Trait | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Primary Ability** | Dexterity |
| **Hit Point Die** | D8 per Rogue level |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Dexterity and Intelligence |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | *Choose 4:* Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Investigation, Perception, Persuasion, Sleight of Hand, or Stealth |
| **Weapon Proficiencies** | Simple weapons and Martial weapons that have the Finesse or Light property |
| **Tool Proficiencies** | Thieves' Tools |
| **Armor Training** | Light armor |
| **Starting Equipment** | *Choose A or B:* (A) Leather Armor, 2 Daggers, Shortsword, Shortbow, 20 Arrows, Quiver, Thieves' Tools, Burglar's Pack, and 8 GP; or (B) 100 GP |

## Rogue Features

| Level | PB | Class Features | Sneak Attack |
|-------|----|----------------|--------------|
| 1 | +2 | Expertise, Sneak Attack, Thieves' Cant, Weapon Mastery | 1d6 |
| 2 | +2 | Cunning Action | 1d6 |
| 3 | +2 | Rogue Subclass, Steady Aim | 2d6 |
| 5 | +3 | Cunning Strike, Uncanny Dodge | 3d6 |
| 6 | +3 | Expertise | 3d6 |
| 7 | +3 | Evasion, Reliable Talent | 4d6 |
| 11 | +4 | Improved Cunning Strike | 6d6 |
| 14 | +5 | Devious Strikes | 7d6 |
| 15 | +5 | Slippery Mind | 8d6 |
| 18 | +6 | Elusive | 9d6 |
| 19 | +6 | Epic Boon | 10d6 |
| 20 | +6 | Stroke of Luck | 10d6 |

## Key Class Features

### Level 1: Expertise
Expertise in two skill proficiencies. Two more at level 6.

### Level 1: Sneak Attack
Once per turn, deal extra 1d6 damage on hit with Finesse or Ranged weapon if you have Advantage, or if an ally is within 5 ft of the target and you don't have Disadvantage.

### Level 1: Thieves' Cant / Weapon Mastery
Know Thieves' Cant and a chosen language. Use mastery properties of two weapons.

### Level 2: Cunning Action
Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a Bonus Action.

### Level 3: Steady Aim
Bonus Action: gain Advantage on next attack this turn (requires not moving this turn; Speed becomes 0).

### Level 5: Cunning Strike / Uncanny Dodge
When you deal Sneak Attack damage, forgo dice to apply effects: Poison (1d6), Trip (1d6), Withdraw (1d6). Reaction: halve damage from a hit.

### Level 7: Evasion / Reliable Talent
Dex save halves to none/halves. Treat d20 of 9 or lower as 10 on skill/tool checks.

### Level 11: Improved Cunning Strike
Up to two Cunning Strike effects per use.

### Level 14: Devious Strikes
New options: Daze (2d6), Knock Out (6d6), Obscure (3d6).

### Level 15: Slippery Mind
Proficiency in Wisdom and Charisma saves.

### Level 18: Elusive
No attack roll can have Advantage against you unless you're Incapacitated.

### Level 20: Stroke of Luck
Turn a failed D20 Test into a 20. Once per Short Rest.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Sorcerer
short_description: A spellcaster who channels innate magic from a sorcerous origin, shaping spells with raw power and Metamagic.
full_description:
# Sorcerer

## Core Sorcerer Traits

| Trait | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Primary Ability** | Charisma |
| **Hit Point Die** | D6 per Sorcerer level |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Constitution and Charisma |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | *Choose 2:* Arcana, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion, or Religion |
| **Weapon Proficiencies** | Simple weapons |
| **Armor Training** | None |
| **Starting Equipment** | *Choose A or B:* (A) Spear, 2 Daggers, Arcane Focus (crystal), Dungeoneer's Pack, and 28 GP; or (B) 50 GP |

## Sorcerer Features

| Level | PB | Class Features | Sorcery Points | Cantrips | Prepared Spells |
|-------|----|----------------|----------------|----------|-----------------|
| 1 | +2 | Spellcasting, Innate Sorcery | — | 4 | 2 |
| 2 | +2 | Font of Magic, Metamagic | 2 | 4 | 4 |
| 3 | +2 | Sorcerer Subclass | 3 | 4 | 6 |
| 5 | +3 | Sorcerous Restoration | 5 | 5 | 9 |
| 7 | +3 | Sorcery Incarnate | 7 | 5 | 11 |
| 10 | +4 | Metamagic | 10 | 6 | 15 |
| 17 | +6 | Metamagic | 17 | 6 | 19 |
| 19 | +6 | Epic Boon | 19 | 6 | 21 |
| 20 | +6 | Arcane Apotheosis | 20 | 6 | 22 |

## Key Class Features

### Level 1: Spellcasting
Charisma is your spellcasting ability. Use an Arcane Focus.

### Level 1: Innate Sorcery
Bonus Action: unleash magic for 1 minute: spell save DC +1, Advantage on Sorcerer spell attack rolls. Two uses per Long Rest.

### Level 2: Font of Magic
Sorcery Points fuel magic. Convert spell slots to SP (level of slot). Create spell slots from SP (Cost table: 2 SP for L1, up to 7 SP for L5).

### Level 2: Metamagic
Know 2 Metamagic options:
- **Careful Spell (1 SP)** – Protect creatures from save spells.
- **Distant Spell (1 SP)** – Double range, or touch becomes 30 ft.
- **Empowered Spell (1 SP)** – Reroll damage dice (up to Cha mod).
- **Extended Spell (1 SP)** – Duration to 24 hours; Advantage on Concentration.
- **Heightened Spell (2 SP)** – Disadvantage on one target's save.
- **Quickened Spell (2 SP)** – Action becomes Bonus Action.
- **Seeking Spell (1 SP)** – Reroll missed spell attack.
- **Subtle Spell (1 SP)** – No verbal/somatic/material components.
- **Transmuted Spell (1 SP)** – Change damage type.
- **Twinned Spell (1 SP)** – Target a second creature.

Gain more options at levels 10 and 17.

### Level 5: Sorcerous Restoration
Short Rest: regain SP equal to half Sorcerer level (round down). Once per Long Rest.

### Level 7: Sorcery Incarnate
If no uses of Innate Sorcery left, spend 2 SP to activate. While active, use up to 2 Metamagic options on each spell.

### Level 20: Arcane Apotheosis
While Innate Sorcery is active, use one Metamagic option per turn without spending SP.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Warlock
short_description: A wielder of magic granted by a pact with an otherworldly patron, channeling Eldritch Invocations and pact magic.
full_description:
# Warlock

## Core Warlock Traits

| Trait | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Primary Ability** | Charisma |
| **Hit Point Die** | D8 per Warlock level |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Wisdom and Charisma |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | *Choose 2:* Arcana, Deception, History, Intimidation, Investigation, Nature, or Religion |
| **Weapon Proficiencies** | Simple weapons |
| **Armor Training** | Light armor |
| **Starting Equipment** | *Choose A or B:* (A) Leather Armor, Sickle, 2 Daggers, Arcane Focus (orb), Book (occult lore), Scholar's Pack, and 15 GP; or (B) 100 GP |

## Warlock Features

| Level | PB | Class Features | Invocations | Cantrips | Prepared Spells | Spell Slots | Slot Level |
|-------|----|----------------|-------------|----------|-----------------|-------------|------------|
| 1 | +2 | Eldritch Invocations, Pact Magic | 1 | 2 | 2 | 1 | 1 |
| 2 | +2 | Magical Cunning | 3 | 2 | 3 | 2 | 1 |
| 3 | +2 | Warlock Subclass | 3 | 2 | 4 | 2 | 2 |
| 5 | +3 | — | 5 | 3 | 6 | 2 | 3 |
| 9 | +4 | Contact Patron | 7 | 3 | 10 | 2 | 5 |
| 11 | +4 | Mystic Arcanum (L6) | 7 | 4 | 11 | 3 | 5 |
| 13 | +5 | Mystic Arcanum (L7) | 8 | 4 | 12 | 3 | 5 |
| 15 | +5 | Mystic Arcanum (L8) | 9 | 4 | 13 | 3 | 5 |
| 17 | +6 | Mystic Arcanum (L9) | 9 | 4 | 14 | 4 | 5 |
| 19 | +6 | Epic Boon | 10 | 4 | 15 | 4 | 5 |
| 20 | +6 | Eldritch Master | 10 | 4 | 15 | 4 | 5 |

## Key Class Features

### Level 1: Eldritch Invocations
Gain 1 invocation. Invocations include: Agonizing Blast, Armor of Shadows, Devil's Sight, Eldritch Mind, Eldritch Spear, Fiendish Vigor, Misty Visions, Pact of the Blade, Pact of the Chain, Pact of the Tome, Repelling Blast, and many more. More invocations gained at higher levels.

### Level 1: Pact Magic
Charisma is your spellcasting ability. Use an Arcane Focus. All spell slots are the same level (shown in Slot Level column). Regain slots on Short Rest.

### Level 2: Magical Cunning
1-minute esoteric rite to regain expended Pact Magic slots (up to half your max, rounded up). Once per Long Rest.

### Level 3: Warlock Subclass
Gain a Warlock subclass.

### Level 9: Contact Patron
Always have *Contact Other Plane* prepared; cast without a slot once per Long Rest and auto-succeed.

### Level 11+: Mystic Arcanum
Learn a level 6+ Warlock spell. Cast once per Long Rest without a slot. Gain new arcanum at 13 (L7), 15 (L8), and 17 (L9).

### Level 20: Eldritch Master
Using Magical Cunning regains all Pact Magic slots.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Wizard
short_description: A scholarly magic-user who studies arcane spells inscribed in a spellbook to wield the broadest array of magic.
full_description:
# Wizard

## Core Wizard Traits

| Trait | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Primary Ability** | Intelligence |
| **Hit Point Die** | D6 per Wizard level |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Intelligence and Wisdom |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | *Choose 2:* Arcana, History, Insight, Investigation, Medicine, Nature, or Religion |
| **Weapon Proficiencies** | Simple weapons |
| **Armor Training** | None |
| **Starting Equipment** | *Choose A or B:* (A) 2 Daggers, Arcane Focus (Quarterstaff), Robe, Spellbook, Scholar's Pack, and 5 GP; or (B) 55 GP |

## Wizard Features

| Level | PB | Class Features | Cantrips | Prepared Spells |
|-------|----|----------------|----------|-----------------|
| 1 | +2 | Spellcasting, Ritual Adept, Arcane Recovery | 3 | 4 |
| 2 | +2 | Scholar | 3 | 5 |
| 3 | +2 | Wizard Subclass | 3 | 6 |
| 5 | +3 | Memorize Spell | 4 | 9 |
| 18 | +6 | Spell Mastery | 5 | 23 |
| 19 | +6 | Epic Boon | 5 | 24 |
| 20 | +6 | Signature Spells | 5 | 25 |

## Key Class Features

### Level 1: Spellcasting
Intelligence is your spellcasting ability. Use an Arcane Focus or your Spellbook as Spellcasting Focus.

### Level 1: Spellbook
Your spellbook contains your known level 1+ Wizard spells. Starts with 6 level 1 spells. Add 2 spells per Wizard level. Copy other Wizard spells (2 hours + 50 GP per level).

### Level 1: Ritual Adept
Cast any spell with the Ritual tag from your spellbook as a Ritual without needing it prepared.

### Level 1: Arcane Recovery
Short Rest: recover spell slots totaling at most half your Wizard level (round up); none above level 5. Once per Long Rest.

### Level 2: Scholar
Pick one skill (Arcana, History, Investigation, Medicine, Nature, Religion). Gain Expertise.

### Level 3: Wizard Subclass
Gain a Wizard subclass.

### Level 5: Memorize Spell
Short Rest: replace one prepared level 1+ spell with another from your spellbook.

### Level 18: Spell Mastery
Choose a level 1 and a level 2 spell with action casting time. Cast at lowest level without slot, at will.

### Level 20: Signature Spells
Choose two level 3 spells. Always prepared. Cast each once without a slot per Short Rest.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*
